title: Browser Smoke Suite: Cost-Efficient Route Validation for Shipping API Dojo v2
summary: Issue #17 added a minimal Playwright smoke suite to complement unit/integration coverage. I built a cost-efficient browser test layer for checkpoint validation and future mirror sites.
body: # Browser Smoke Suite: Cost-Efficient Route Validation for Shipping API Dojo v2
heroImageAlt: A Playwright test runner dashboard showing smoke test results for core routes: home, learn track hubs, lesson flow, arena, wiki, and directory
author: Nicolas Brulay
